attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 CASE WHEN NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY <0  THEN NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE  NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY1 ,
 /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
  CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
  THEN -777
  ELSE COALESCE(NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
  END AS            DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NBM.AR_TRX_KEY,
  NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  'NON_XAAS' AS TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME1
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NBM
  /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
     INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO 
    ON CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
     WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
      WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
     ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END    =  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  
  INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHANNEL_REV_MONTH_CNTL CRD
  ON NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CRD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT

  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON NBM.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY

    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY

	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
ON CASE WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
       WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
        WHEN NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BETWEEN  -1011801 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
       ELSE NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  /*AND NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CRD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD */
  WHERE  NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')
  AND (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT') /* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','MITG-SVC-TRX','OM-FBINV') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT LIKE ALL('%XAAS%') )
	OR ((NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING') OR (NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME  IN  ('BPA-OM-Offset') AND  NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME  IN  ('AR-TRXN-EXT'))) AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT LIKE ALL('%XAAS%') )/*OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
	)/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
    AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD  NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT OCTFY21 RELEASE */
  AND NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD' /*Select DVAD records*/
  GROUP BY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY1,
  DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NBM.AR_TRX_KEY,
  NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME1

SELECT 
  EDC.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  EDC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  EDC.SALES_ORDER_KEY  AS SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  EDC.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY  AS DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY, 
  EDC.DEALS_PPSK    AS DEALS_PPSK,  
  EDC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD    AS DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD,
  EDC.DEALS_CNTRY_CD       AS DEALS_CNTRY_CD,        
         COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DEALS_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
  CASE 
   WHEN EDC.DEALS_PPSK = -999 THEN -999 
   ELSE 
    CASE 
     WHEN EDC.DEALS_PPSK = EDC.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY THEN EDC.DEALS_PPSK 
     ELSE 
      CASE 
       WHEN EDC.DEALS_CNTRY_CD = EDC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD THEN  EDC.DEALS_PPSK 
       ELSE 
        CASE 
         WHEN COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN EDC.DEALS_PPSK 
         ELSE COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)
        END
      END
    END
  END       AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
    CASE WHEN EDC.DEALS_PPSK = -999 THEN 'N' 
   ELSE CASE WHEN EDC.DEALS_PPSK = DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY THEN 'N' 
    ELSE CASE WHEN EDC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD = 'UNK' THEN 'N'
     ELSE CASE WHEN EDC.DEALS_CNTRY_CD = EDC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD THEN  'N' 
      ELSE 'Y' 
     END
    END
   END
  END  AS CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
  EDC.AR_TRX_KEY ,
   EDC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDC.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   EDC.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   EDC.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME AS TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_CHANNEL_DVAD_PRT_CNT EDC
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
 ON EDC.DEALS_PPSK = NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  
 (
 SELECT 
  PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
  COALESCE(PS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT,-999) PARTY_ID,
  COALESCE(DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
  COALESCE (BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 FROM 
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS,
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY PC
 WHERE  1=1
  AND PS.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY = PC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
  AND PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
  AND PC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
  GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
  ORDER BY PARTY_ID ASC) =1
 ) DSHIP
  ON  COALESCE(NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) = DSHIP.GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
  AND  EDC.DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD = DSHIP.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE

SELECT 
     NBM.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
    ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
    ,NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
    ,EDC.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  --'Y' AS CHANNEL_FLG,
    CASE
      --WHEN NBM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = 'REBATES' THEN 'N'
      WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  = 'WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
	  ELSE 'Y' END AS CHANNEL_FLG
      ,EDC.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
      ,'DVAD' RTM_TYPE
      ,EDC.AR_TRX_KEY
   FROM 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NBM LEFT JOIN
  (SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY GROUP BY 1,2) RSH 
    ON NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY INNER JOIN
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO 
	ON CASE WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
       WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
        WHEN NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
       ELSE NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY END    =  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DM_DEAL_PARTNER_VW STDEALS 
   ON NSO.BK_DEAL_ID = STDEALS.OPTY_NUMBER 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
   ON STDEALS.PARTNER_SITE_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AND
   NP.SS_CODE = 'CR'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
   ON NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = NP.PARTY_KEY
   AND NCPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N', /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/ 
  $$STGDB.WI_GL_CHANNEL_REV_MONTH_CNTL CRD,
  $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_CHANNEL_DAVD_PSPK EDC
  /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
   WHERE NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CRD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  /*AND NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CRD.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD */
  /*pneelraj : As part CBF Enhance July CDR*/
 AND CASE WHEN NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY <0  THEN NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE  NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END = EDC.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 AND NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY= EDC.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
   AND NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=EDC.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
       AND  CASE WHEN NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
  THEN -777
  ELSE COALESCE(NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
  END   =  EDC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
    AND   NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = EDC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
	AND NBM.AR_TRX_KEY=EDC.AR_TRX_KEY
   AND NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=EDC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    AND   NBM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('POS','POS_ADJ')
    AND   NBM.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD = 'DVAD'
   AND EDC.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME='NON_XAAS'	/*DVAD records only*/

SELECT
  WDVAD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDVAD.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY   SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  EBT.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN -999
   ELSE COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-999) 
  END     DEALS_PPSK_AS_IS,
  CASE WHEN DEALS_PPSK_AS_IS =-999 AND NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
   THEN COALESCE(SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) 
   ELSE DEALS_PPSK_AS_IS END AS DEALS_PPSK,
   WDVAD.AR_TRX_KEY,
 WDVAD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDVAD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WDVAD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   WDVAD.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_CHANNEL_DVAD_PATNS WDVAD
 
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE EBT 
  ON CASE  WHEN WDVAD.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999  ELSE WDVAD.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY END  = EBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
  
 INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO 
  ON CASE WHEN WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
   WHEN WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
    WHEN WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
   ELSE WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY END    =  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DM_DEAL_PARTNER_VW STDEALS 
  ON NSO.BK_DEAL_ID = STDEALS.OPTY_NUMBER 
   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
  ON STDEALS.PARTNER_SITE_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT AND
  NP.SS_CODE = 'CR'
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
  ON NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = NP.PARTY_KEY
  AND NCPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ( $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP

  ON(NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER) 
      )
  ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY= WDVAD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY )
   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE STP
  ON STP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WDVAD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE SHIPS
  ON STP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  AND SHIPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
  WHERE TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME='NON_XAAS' 
	UNION
	SELECT
  WDVAD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDVAD.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY   SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  EBT.DD_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY  DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
  CASE 
	WHEN NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL THEN -999
    WHEN BPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL THEN COALESCE(NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY ,-999)
    WHEN NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = BPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
             THEN BPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
    WHEN NCPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY  <> BPS.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
             THEN NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
        ELSE -999
   END  AS DEALS_PPSK_AS_IS,
  CASE WHEN DEALS_PPSK_AS_IS =-999 AND NCA.ERP_PARTY_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
   THEN COALESCE(SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) 
   ELSE DEALS_PPSK_AS_IS END AS DEALS_PPSK,
   WDVAD.AR_TRX_KEY,
 WDVAD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WDVAD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WDVAD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   WDVAD.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_CHANNEL_DVAD_PATNS WDVAD
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.BT_END_CUSTOMER_BRIDGE EBT 
  ON CASE  WHEN WDVAD.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999  ELSE WDVAD.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY END  = EBT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO 
  ON CASE WHEN WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999 
   WHEN WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888  
    WHEN WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN  -1011800 AND -1010000 THEN -7777
   ELSE WDVAD.SALES_ORDER_KEY END    =  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DM_DEAL_PARTNER_VW STDEALS 
   ON NSO.BK_DEAL_ID = STDEALS.OPTY_NUMBER 

  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE BTP 
   ON BTP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY  = CASE WHEN  WDVAD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  BETWEEN   -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE WDVAD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END

  INNER JOIN (SELECT NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY, NEP.PARTY_KEY ,NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP
  ON(NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER) 
      ) NCA
  ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY= WDVAD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY )
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPS
   ON NCPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY = NCA.PARTY_KEY
   AND NCPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  BPS
   ON BTP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=BPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   AND BPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE STP
  ON STP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = WDVAD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE SHIPS
  ON STP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
  AND SHIPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N' 
WHERE TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME='XAAS'

SELECT 
  EDPI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  EDPI.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  EDPI.SALES_ORDER_KEY    AS SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  EDPI.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY   AS DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY, 
  EDPI.DEALS_PPSK     AS DEALS_PPSK,
  COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK')  AS DV_END_CUST_COUNTRY_CD,
  COALESCE(DEALS_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK')  AS DEALS_CNTRY_CD,
  EDPI.AR_TRX_KEY,
  EDPI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  EDPI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  EDPI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  EDPI.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME AS TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME
 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_CHANNEL_DVAD_PARTNER   EDPI
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (
 SEL NPLA.PARTY_KEY, NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR  NL
  ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NL.LOCATOR_KEY
  AND NL.SS_CODE IN ('CR','CR_MODS')
  AND NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE = 'POSTAL ADDRESS'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
  ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY) DEALS_CTRY
  
  ON EDPI.DEALS_PPSK = DEALS_CTRY.PARTY_KEY 
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (
 SEL NPLA.PARTY_KEY, NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR  NL
  ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NL.LOCATOR_KEY
  AND NL.SS_CODE IN ('CR','CR_MODS')
  AND NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE = 'POSTAL ADDRESS'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
  ON NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY = NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY ) END_CTRY
  
  ON EDPI.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = END_CTRY.PARTY_KEY
